baseline.note: ledger totals that predate canonical lifecycle accounting (accounted explicitly)

reconciliation.scope_note: lifecycle counts are cumulative since canonical accounting began; baseline counts are legacy ledger totals that predate it; ledger/gate totals == baseline + accounted.

learning.note: the bot's own settled-trade experience (calibrated edge model) adjusts the directional probability; it grows as more trades settle. The execution-quality gate, paper-realism, and reconciliation are unchanged and still veto every trade — learning can never bypass them.

last_note.summary: Only 3 signals total (all UP_STRONG, n=3, win-rate 33%, realized PnL -$8.24) makes every bucket statistically meaningless; positive avg EV (0.073) is driven by tiny n=1 slices that flip between 0% and 100% win-rate. No context can be labeled genuinely predictive versus noise.
working: avg_ev_after_cost remains positive (0.073) across all reported buckets
n=1 slices such as vwap_reclaim, breakout_up, and mtf_neutral show +1.76 PnL but are single observations only
failing: overall win-rate 0.33 and negative realized PnL on the full set of 3 trades
majority of buckets (supertrend_bearish, adx_normal, bb_squeeze, htf_bullish, etc.) simply restate the same 3 trades with no differentiation
warnings: total sample n=3 and min_samples=50 requirement means zero buckets are eligible for promotion
n=1 and n=2 sub-buckets (hurst, volume, candle_pressure, range_state, mtf_alignment) are textbook overfitting risk
observe-only diagnostic; any apparent edge must be re-tested on hundreds of new signals before any credibility

analyst_A.note: observe-only Grok research analysis of signal performance; never trades.

predictor_B.note: observe-only Grok P(up) per signal; graded vs realized BTC move before it could ever be trusted; never places/sizes/bypasses a trade.

grok_signal_intel.note: A analyzes signal-learning performance; B predicts P(up) per signal and is graded vs realized moves. Both observe-only — never place/size/bypass a trade; the execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

learned_selectivity_gate.note: rejects candidates in proven-losing buckets using live ledger evidence; can only make the bot MORE selective — never trades, resizes, or bypasses the execution gate. Exploration trades are tracked separately from passed.

counterfactual.note: in-sample replay using final accumulated bucket evidence (diagnostic estimate)

tradingview_latest_signal.indicator_name: Hermes BTC Pulse Composite v3 Loose

BTCUSD.indicator_name: Hermes BTC Pulse Composite v3 Loose

tradingview.note: TradingView alerts are candidate signals only — they cannot place, resize, or bypass trades; the strategy + execution gate remain the sole trade authority.

edge_vs_5min_outcome.note: observe-only: did the TradingView signal at entry predict the 5-min Chainlink outcome (signal_hit_rate vs baseline_up_rate), and did aligning help the bot win (aligned vs opposed bot_win_rate)? Never affects trading.

rsi_trend.note: observe-only: learns P(next 5-min outcome | RSI alert trend state) from the alert history and scores its own next-window predictions. Never trades.

best_buckets.bucket: Hermes BTC Pulse Composite v3 Loose

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

signal_gate.note: when active, a paper trade is taken only if a fresh TradingView signal agrees with the side; it can only PREVENT trades, never force or bypass them.
